title: Kurfürstendamm Berlin: Quick Summary
items: **The Ku'damm starts at Breitscheidplatz, not KaDeWe.** KaDeWe is on Tauentzienstraße; the Kurfürstendamm runs 3.5 km west to Rathenauplatz.
**Walk Wittenbergplatz to Uhlandstraße.** The combined 1.3 to 1.4 km visitor axis takes about 18 minutes; stay around Breitscheidplatz if time is short.
**The church and Bikini terrace are free.** Check current tower-hall hours. The terrace overlooks the zoo; the direct monkey view is indoors.
**C/O Berlin opens daily 11:00 to 20:00.** Tickets cost 15 or 8 euros; visitors aged 18 and under enter free.
**Zone AB covers the route.** From Alexanderplatz take the S-Bahn to Zoo; leave via U Kurfürstendamm, U Uhlandstraße or U Adenauerplatz.
